Title: current_charset
Description: This function returns the "preferred" name of the current charset as a string.

It returns value which is set in the INI file or those which is set with 'SET CHARSET=..'
	  call. This cannot be used to return charset for the current HTTP connection in the VSP or VSPX context.
Examples:
SQL> select current_charset();
callret
VARCHAR
ISO-8859-1
